title: Artemis Pack
description: A Modpack for a private server.
body:
This comprehensive modpack encompasses a diverse range of enhancements for Minecraft version 1.19.2. It includes a carefully curated selection of over 130 mods, catering to various aspects of gameplay. From cutting-edge technological features like Applied Energistics and Create to the enchanting world of magic through Botania, this modpack offers a plethora of options for players to explore and integrate into their Minecraft experience.

Designed primarily for private use among friends, this modpack fosters a collaborative and immersive gaming environment. It is compatible with the Fabric-based launcher, ensuring a seamless integration of all included mods without compromising stability.

In addition to its technological and magical components, this modpack also incorporates RPG elements, enhancing combat mechanics and providing players with a deeper and more engaging gameplay experience.
